description.value: You always know where to find family, and family is everything. When you're in a settlement or an area you could conceivably meet another ysoki, you can spend 1 hour asking around to find a cousin of yours. The cousin begins with an attitude of friendly toward you and will grant you simple Requests, so long as they would be reasonable to ask (subject to GM discretion). You can attempt to make a more substantial @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Request], usually for a favor in exchange. The GM decides the DC based on the difficulty of the favor and the amount of risk it poses to your cousin.
